title: glochidion trusanicum
intro: Glochidion trusanicum, also known as the Philippine yellow myrtle, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glochidion trusanicum include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Glochidion trusanicum include tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be made by steaming the leaves and stems of the plant.
